_about: Curated demo inputs for the Realism-Matched Synthetic Channel experiment (art_FtN4LBzazO_l). frontier_table = iter-1 real-text frontier pilot calibration target (metadata.frontier_table); topology = 6 smallest NarrativeTime point gold graphs for the topology realism check; qcn_examples = synthetic point QCN outputs for the composition-table cross-check.
